content.metaDescription: Medical ID, vehicle emergency stickers, lost & found, and pet collars — privacy-first QR tags for when seconds count.
content.heroSub: Tag wallets, vehicles, bags, and collars with a QR that shows emergency facts to scanners while keeping phone numbers and deep records owner-controlled.
content.featuresSub: Share what saves time in an emergency. Withhold what is personal until you choose.

features.title: Emergency VIEW Fields
features.desc: Blood group, allergies, vehicle reg, insurance validity — structured for first responders, not a wall of private data.

features.title: Privacy Layering
features.desc: Deep records stay NOVIEW. Contact runs through Message Owner so finders never see your mobile on a public tag.

features.title: Living Updates
features.desc: Change meds, insurance, or pet vet notes anytime — same sticker, updated sheet.

features.title: Works Everywhere
features.desc: Any smartphone camera scans. No app install for the person helping you.

content.howItWorksSub: Pick a starter template, generate your QR, claim and attach what scanners should see.

steps.title: Choose Your Template
steps.desc: Select Medical, Vehicle, Pet, or Personal — each maps to a MasterTemplate sheet for your use case.

steps.title: Generate & Print
steps.desc: Create a unique SER_ QR, print on card or sticker, and attach to wallet, windshield, bag, or collar.

steps.title: Claim & Control
steps.desc: Sign in with Google, fill emergency VIEW fields, and set sensitive rows to NOVIEW.

aboutParagraphs: QRTagAll in Safety & Emergency connects physical anchors — wallet cards, windshield tags, bag flaps, collar plates — to structured, updatable information.
The same platform powers medical ID, roadside help, lost-item reunion, and pet recovery with one privacy model: share what helps; hide what hurts.
Powered by QRTagAll — tag it, own it, share it on your terms.
